song.title: When My Blest Lord Will Come Again
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) When my blest Lord Will come again, I will be saved from all my pain, With all the saints I’ll follow Him,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! With all the saints I’ll follow Him, O praise the Lord!
[V2] 2) When I shall see Him Face to face, And dwell with Him through endless days, I will rejoice and sing His grace,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! I will rejoice and sing His grace, O praise the Lord!
[V3] 3) When I meet Him Before the Throne, My suff’rings then will all be gone, The joy of vict’ry will be won,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! The joy of vict’ry will be won, O praise the Lord!
[V4] 4) In that day I will testify That nothing with Christ’s life can vie, What glorious rapture to the sky,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! What glorious rapture to the sky, O praise the Lord!
[V5] 5) May we in our Lord’s Side e’er hide, Be always one and ne’er divide, That His heart may be satisfied,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! That His heart may be satisfied, O praise the Lord!
[V6] 6) O come, our King, O come, dear Lord! Receive us by Thy promised word, And give the victors Thy reward,|| O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord! O praise the Lord!
song.author: Watchman Nee
